summary: Tested new features for Multi-Engine Trading Management System: Adelaide timezone scheduler, Boss broadcast, Devil directives, Supervisor daily reports, God/Scribe sections. 16/17 backend tests passed (1 transient 502). All frontend features verified working.

minor.issue: Transient 502 error on first request (passed on retry)

issues: Cyan/aqua colors (text-cyan-400) used in some components - violates strict color rules (green=profit, red=loss only)

passed_tests: GET /api/scheduler/countdown returns Adelaide timezone with countdown_display (HH:MM:SS), next_reset, period_stats
GET /api/scheduler/countdown includes hours, minutes, seconds breakdown
POST /api/boss/broadcast sends message to all supervisors
POST /api/boss/broadcast requires message field (400 on empty)
POST /api/devil/directive sends directive to specific supervisor
POST /api/devil/directive with target=ALL sends to all supervisors
POST /api/devil/directive requires message field (400 on empty)
GET /api/devil/directives/{supervisor_id} returns directives for that supervisor
GET /api/devil/directives returns all directives across supervisors
Supervisor daily report structure includes all required fields
Supervisor daily reports include Devil directives
Supervisor daily reports include bot details with wins/losses/WR/P&L/actions
Boss broadcast appears in supervisor directives (integration test)
Countdown and stats endpoints are consistent

header_countdown.description: Header shows countdown timer (19:06:31 format) next to trades/wins/losses

command_center_countdown.description: Command Center shows 'RESET: HH:MM:SS' in top-right

devil_chat_shrunk.description: Devil chat height is ~79px (80% reduction from 120px, close to target ~50px)

devil_25_word_limit.description: Devil responds with concise messages (DEVIL_SYSTEM_PROMPT enforces 25-word limit)

boss_broadcast.description: Boss broadcast input bar appears below Devil chat, sends to all supervisors

god_enforcement_counters.description: God section shows ENFORCEMENT ACTIVE with Audits, Promoted, Hell, Brainwashed, Sacked, Total Actions

god_bible_review.description: God section shows BIBLE REVIEW with Total, Useful, Garbage counts

god_activity_log.description: God section shows ACTIVITY LOG (WHY) with action details

scribe_daily_analysis.description: Scribe section shows DAILY ANALYSIS with Analyzed, Winners, Failures, Middling (neutrals), Curated

scribe_failure_pattern_report.description: Scribe section shows FAILURE PATTERN REPORT with patterns (SIM_TIMEOUT, UNKNOWN, STOP_LOSS, etc.) and actions

supervisor_report_section.description: Supervisor cards show REPORT section with struggling count and stars

supervisor_devil_directive_banner.description: Supervisor cards show Devil/Boss directive banners when directives exist

action_items: MINOR: Remove cyan/aqua colors from GodPanel.jsx, BiblePanel.jsx, SupervisorPanel.jsx to comply with strict color rules
critical_code_review_comments: Adelaide timezone scheduler correctly uses ZoneInfo('Australia/Adelaide') with 10:00 AM reset
Devil chat DEVIL_SYSTEM_PROMPT enforces 25-word limit at line 24 of devil_chat.py
Scribe analyze_fleet() correctly calculates neutrals = total - winners - failures
Boss broadcast correctly propagates to all supervisor directives
Supervisor daily reports include comprehensive bot details with actions taken
seed_data_creation: None - system uses live data from 74 SIM engines
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features are working: (1) Adelaide timezone scheduler with countdown in header and Command Center, (2) Boss broadcast system sends to all supervisors, (3) Devil directives appear on supervisor cards, (4) Supervisor daily reports include struggling bots and stars, (5) God section shows enforcement counters and Bible review, (6) Scribe section shows daily analysis with correct math (neutrals count fixed). Minor issue: cyan colors in some legacy components violate strict color rules. cTrader execution is MOCKED (pending Spotware approval).

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/scheduler/countdown: Returns Adelaide timezone countdown with HH:MM:SS display and period_stats
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/supervisors/daily-reports: Returns 8 supervisor reports with bot details
